subtitle.text: Every machine in Create runs on rotation. Learn what that means.

description: CH.03 · THE ROTATIONAL FORCE
▸ Create's entire system runs on one concept:
rotational force flows through connected machines.
Everything else is just what you do with it.
◈ CORE CONCEPTS
└ RPM (Rotations Per Minute): how fast rotation flows
Higher RPM = faster machines (some cap out)
└ Stress Capacity: how much a source can power
Every machine costs stress. Sources provide it.
└ Cogwheels: transfer rotation between axes
Small cogwheel = speed up. Large = slow down.
└ Shafts: extend rotation along an axis
└ Gearboxes: change rotation direction
◈ POWER SOURCES (early)
└ Water Wheel: 4 SU at base RPM (needs flowing water)
└ Hand Crank: 0 SU (manual, slows you)
└ Windmill Bearing: scales with sail count
Maximum 64 sails = high RPM
└ Steam Engine (Ch06): significant upgrade
◈ SCROLL: The Rotational Force
└ Found in: mechanical workshop ruins,
old factory floor notes, engineer camp chests
└ Research time: 20 min
└ Unlocks: full Create rotation system, stress calc knowledge
▸ The wheel turns. The shaft carries it.
The cogwheel changes its speed.
The machine does the work.
You built all of it.
▶ Find The Rotational Force scroll [check]
▶ Craft 8 Cogwheels
▶ Craft 4 Shafts
◇ Ch06 Steam adds the Boiler + Steam Engine.
That's where Create gets serious power.
Water wheels are early infrastructure only.
